name: TDS - War Games
short_description: TDS - War Games is a fast paced, local 2-4 player split-screen shooter where you and your friends competitively combat each other over the objective set. Customize your player loadout, choose an arena, setup a game-mode and start battling. Only the merciless will claim victory.
detailed_description:
TDS - War Games is a local pvp party game where you and your friends fight viciously over the objective for the title of victor.

  • Fast paced, top-down perspective action.
  • 2 - 4 local split-screen multiplayer.
  • Several unique arenas varying in size, scope and theme.
  • Customizable player loadouts.
  • Customizable game modes. Including familiar game modes such as,
    • Death Match.
    • King of the Hill.
    • Capture the Flag.
